name: io.github.MkTurner74/botverse
description: Video transcoding and document conversion for AI agents. Per-job billing, no infrastructure.

environmentVariables.name: BOTVERSE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Botverse API key (bv_live_...). Generate at https://botverse.cloud/dashboard/api-keys

environmentVariables.name: BOTVERSE_CONNECTOR_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your Botverse connector URL (https://botverse.cloud/mcp?token=bv_sess_...). Alternative to API key — recommended for claude.ai and browser clients.
